description_long: This is a pair of sporty, wraparound sunglasses with a bold, angular design. The frame is robust and features a full-rim structure that curves around the face, providing extensive coverage and protection. The lenses are large, single-piece, and darkly tinted, offering a seamless, shield-like appearance. The temples are straight with a slight downward curve at the ends, and they feature a metallic accent and a prominent white logo on both sides. The bridge is integrated into the frame with a geometric, angular cutout at the bottom center, enhancing the aggressive, modern aesthetic. The overall style is aerodynamic and functional, suitable for active urban environments or sports.
description: Sporty, wraparound sunglasses with a full-rim, angular frame and large, dark shield-style lenses. The temples feature metallic accents and a bold white logo.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, single-piece dark lens and the angular, full-rim frame with a distinctive cutout at the bridge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight temple with a metallic accent and a prominent white logo, as well as the curvature of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the inner curvature of the frame and temples, emphasizing the wraparound fit and the integrated bridge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the metallic temple accent and white logo, along with the frame's aerodynamic profile.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is a full-rim, wraparound style with a bold, angular geometry and a pronounced, shield-like front. It is thick and robust, with straight temples that curve slightly downward at the ends. The design is sporty and aerodynamic, with a geometric cutout at the bridge for added visual interest.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are a single, continuous piece with a dark gray tint, providing high coverage and a mirrored, shield-like effect. The tint is uniform across the entire lens, with no visible gradient or color shift.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is integrated into the frame with a geometric, angular cutout at the bottom center. It is a solid, molded structure without separate nose pads, contributing to the aggressive, modern look.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight and moderately thick, featuring a metallic accent along the length and a bold white logo near the hinge area. The ends of the temples curve slightly downward for a secure fit.
attribute_brand_logo: A white logo is visible on both temples, printed in a stylized script near the hinge area.
